growth_os_integration_hub.name: GOS Integration Hub
growth_os_integration_hub.purpose: Generic catalog to register and connect third-party services with API keys
growth_os_integration_hub.status: placeholder — CRUD shell with no actual integration logic
growth_os_integration_hub.auth_method: Plaintext API key entered via dialog input, stored in JSONB
growth_os_integration_hub.sync_logic: none — no Edge Function, no trigger, no cron job
growth_os_integration_hub.error_handling: error_message column exists on gos_integration_instances but is never populated
missing_pieces: Actual API calls to any provider
Dynamic config form based on config_schema
Global vs client-specific filtering via is_global

platform_integrations.name: Meta / Facebook Ads
platform_integrations.status: implemented in platform — NOT connected to Growth OS
platform_integrations.auth_method: OAuth via meta-oauth Edge Function, tokens stored in Supabase Vault
platform_integrations.config_location: Platform connection settings, CRM integrations page
platform_integrations.storage_location: platform_connections table with token_reference (UUID) pointing to Vault
platform_integrations.sync_logic: sync-meta-ads Edge Function, can be triggered manually or via cron
platform_integrations.reconnect_logic: meta-oauth Edge Function handles token refresh
missing_pieces_for_gos: No link between GOS integration hub and platform Meta connection

platform_integrations.name: Google Sheets
platform_integrations.status: implemented in platform — NOT connected to Growth OS
platform_integrations.config_location: Client detail page, google_sheet_url column on clients table
missing_pieces_for_gos: No integration between GOS and Google Sheets sync

platform_integrations.name: Telegram Bot
platform_integrations.status: implemented in platform — NOT connected to Growth OS
platform_integrations.storage_location: Vault via store-bot-token Edge Function, reference in crm_bot_profiles.bot_token_ref
platform_integrations.sync_logic: telegram-bot Edge Function handles webhook messages
missing_pieces_for_gos: No link between GOS notifications and Telegram

platform_integrations.name: CRM Webhooks
platform_integrations.status: implemented in CRM module — NOT connected to Growth OS
platform_integrations.storage_location: crm_webhook_endpoints table with secret_key and field_mapping
platform_integrations.sync_logic: crm-webhook Edge Function processes incoming webhooks, creates leads
platform_integrations.error_handling: crm_webhook_logs table with status and response_message
missing_pieces_for_gos: GOS form submissions should be able to create CRM leads via this webhook system
GOS routing rules reference 'webhook' action but cannot trigger CRM webhooks

platform_integrations.name: Email (Resend)
platform_integrations.status: implemented in platform — NOT connected to Growth OS
platform_integrations.sync_logic: send-notification Edge Function sends emails on events
missing_pieces_for_gos: No email notification on form submission
No email notification on onboarding completion
GOS routing 'notify' action cannot send emails

platform_integrations.name: Web Push Notifications
platform_integrations.status: implemented in platform — NOT connected to Growth OS
missing_pieces_for_gos: No push notification on GOS events

integrations_not_present.name: Google Ads
integrations_not_present.status: missing — referenced in onboarding flow defaults but no implementation
integrations_not_present.notes: Onboarding flow has 'Google Ads Access' checkbox field but no actual Google Ads API integration exists anywhere in the platform

integrations_not_present.name: TikTok Ads
integrations_not_present.status: missing — clients table has tiktok_sheet_url but no TikTok API integration
integrations_not_present.notes: Data comes via Google Sheets only, not TikTok API

integrations_not_present.name: Zapier / Make
integrations_not_present.notes: No webhook-out system for external automation platforms
